title: US stops Poland troop deployment after Germany pullout order
summary: Both Democratic and Republican lawmakers in the US have criticized the Trump administration's plans to cancel a troop deployment to Poland. It came after Trump ordered the pullout of 5,000 troops from Germany.

title: Germany news: Chancellor Merz says he wouldn't advise his kids to go to the US
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz said he wouldn't currently advise young Germans like his children to move to the US to study or work. He cited "the social climate that has suddenly developed."

title: Dead whale spotted off the coast of Denmark
summary: It was not immediately clear if the whale was Timmy, the humpback whale that captivated Germany for weeks while getting stranded multiple times off the German coast. Danish officials said they would test a tissue sample.

title: Angela Merkel rejects 'male-killing' label as 'absurd'
summary: Germany's first female chancellor, Angela Merkel, has spoken about her rise to the top. She rejected accusations that she ruthlessly pushed aside male rivals as "baseless."

title: Germany news: Merkel urges patience for Merz's coalition
summary: Former Chancellor Angela Merkel says she thinks people need to have patience with the coalition government, amid widespread dissatisfaction. Meanwhile, Germany's men are celebrating Father's Day.

title: Iconic German musician Udo Lindenberg turns 80
summary: From a historic East German concert to a hit with rapper Apache 207, Udo Lindenberg has shaped German rock music like few others. Even at 80, the "Panikrocker" is still reinventing himself.

title: German intelligence offices snub US-based Palantir software
summary: Germany's domestic intelligence agency has reportedly chosen a data analysis system from France, instead of US-based Palantir. Civil society has welcomed the move, but says more must be done.

title: New film portrays Thomas and Erika Mann — with an oddly twisted premise
summary: Premiering at Cannes and starring Sandra Hüller, Pawel Pawlikowski's "Fatherland" is set during the Cold War — a complex period for the prominent anti-Nazi intellectuals.

title: Bayern Munich exit Champions League in semifinal to PSG
summary: Holders Paris Saint-Germain are one game away from retaining the Champions League after knocking out German champions Bayern Munich. Bayern can still complete the domestic double but again miss out on the big one.
